sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28985" key="dusepiti/mhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεπι-τίμητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n28985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to criticize</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:543:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">543.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
